content.full_text:
September 2, 2005

Holly M. Cook
Treasurer, Connelly for District 1
Post Office Box 30
Oroville, CA 95965

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-05-165

Dear Ms. Cook:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per your telephone request on September 1, 2005.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant
